forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: f380
+title: 'swissarmyhammer-treesitter test_status_after_scan: flaky on HuggingFace HTTP 500'
+---
+## Symptom
+
+`swissarmyhammer-treesitter::index::tests::test_status_after_scan` panics intermittently when HuggingFace returns HTTP 500 while resolving the ANE CoreML model `wballard/Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B-CoreML`.
+
+This is a network-dependent test — fragile by design. The right fix is one of:
+- Skip the model resolution when offline (and assert reduced behavior)
+- Cache the model locally so CI can resolve from disk
+- Remove the model resolution from this specific status test (test the post-scan status independently)
+
+## Reproduction
+
+`cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-treesitter index::tests::test_status_after_scan` — passes when HF is up, panics when HF returns 500.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- [ ] Test no longer depends on a live HuggingFace fetch.
+- [ ] CI can run this test offline without panicking.
+- [ ] Test still asserts something useful about post-scan status.
+
+## Tags
+
+#test-failure
\ No newline at end of file

changes.value: swissarmyhammer-treesitter test_status_after_scan: flaky on HuggingFace HTTP 500

## Symptom

`swissarmyhammer-treesitter::index::tests::test_status_after_scan` panics intermittently when HuggingFace returns HTTP 500 while resolving the ANE CoreML model `wballard/Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B-CoreML`.

This is a network-dependent test — fragile by design. The right fix is one of:
- Skip the model resolution when offline (and assert reduced behavior)
- Cache the model locally so CI can resolve from disk
- Remove the model resolution from this specific status test (test the post-scan status independently)

## Reproduction

`cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-treesitter index::tests::test_status_after_scan` — passes when HF is up, panics when HF returns 500.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Test no longer depends on a live HuggingFace fetch.
- [ ] CI can run this test offline without panicking.
- [ ] Test still asserts something useful about post-scan status.

## Tags

#test-failure

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -3,26 +3,37 @@
 - claude-code
 position_column: todo
 position_ordinal: f380
-title: 'swissarmyhammer-treesitter test_status_after_scan: flaky on HuggingFace HTTP 500'
+title: 'swissarmyhammer-treesitter::index::tests: HuggingFace network flakes'
 ---
 ## Symptom

-`swissarmyhammer-treesitter::index::tests::test_status_after_scan` panics intermittently when HuggingFace returns HTTP 500 while resolving the ANE CoreML model `wballard/Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B-CoreML`.
+Multiple tests in `swissarmyhammer-treesitter::index::tests` fail intermittently when HuggingFace returns HTTP 500 while resolving the ANE CoreML model `wballard/Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B-CoreML`.
+
+Observed failures:
+- `test_status_after_scan`
+- `test_get_nonexistent`
+- `test_scan_directory`
+
+Likely the entire module shares the failure mode — any test that goes through `IndexContext::new` + `scan()` is exposed.

-This is a network-dependent test — fragile by design. The right fix is one of:
+This is network-dependent test design — fragile by construction.
+
+## Fix direction
+
+One of:
 - Skip the model resolution when offline (and assert reduced behavior)
 - Cache the model locally so CI can resolve from disk
-- Remove the model resolution from this specific status test (test the post-scan status independently)
+- Decouple the status/scan tests from the model resolution path

 ## Reproduction

-`cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-treesitter index::tests::test_status_after_scan` — passes when HF is up, panics when HF returns 500.
+`cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-treesitter index::tests::test_status_after_scan` (or any of the affected tests) — passes when HF is up, panics when HF returns 500.

 ## Acceptance Criteria

-- [ ] Test no longer depends on a live HuggingFace fetch.
-- [ ] CI can run this test offline without panicking.
-- [ ] Test still asserts something useful about post-scan status.
+- [ ] No test in `swissarmyhammer-treesitter::index::tests` depends on a live HuggingFace fetch.
+- [ ] CI can run the workspace offline without panicking.
+- [ ] The replacement still asserts something useful about post-scan status.

 ## Tags
